summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, fix PRs, and merge are disabled. The security-sensitive linked issue and its directly linked hook-payload PR are routed to central security handling; three open non-security PRs need targeted maintainer judgment because proof/checks or broad product scope block safe automation; the clean tool-warning PR is kept open as related.
